meta.title: Globalle — Global Real Estate Intelligence
meta.description: A weekly global real estate intelligence newsletter. Practices from the world's best markets, translated into action for professionals everywhere.

gateway.headline: Which path is yours?
gateway.investors_body: Specialized advisory for cross-border real estate investment. We support you from defining your investment thesis to closing, with property curation and close guidance at every step.
gateway.pros_body: A market-intelligence hub, with applicable practices from markets around the world, translated for your day-to-day. Continuous learning to become a global professional.

hero.headline: Global Real Estate Intelligence, translated into local action.
hero.subheadline: Every week, we show you what the world's best real estate firms are doing — and how to apply it in your market.

approach.label: Our Approach
approach.headline: The market is global. So should you be.
approach.col1_body: We dig deep into the practices of the world's best real estate firms and translate that knowledge into content you can actually apply in your own market.
approach.col2_body: We're not a news digest. We're a strategic intelligence platform: every issue brings a real case, a proven technique, and one concrete step you can implement this week.
approach.quote: Globalle: a platform connecting the real estate market to the world through content that matters to every professional in the industry.

manifesto.label: Manifesto
manifesto.headline: Why the world needs real estate professionals with a global mindset
manifesto.p1: Knowledge has gone global, but it remains scattered. Every day, real estate professionals in different countries develop new strategies for sales, marketing, management, technology and client relationships. Most of those ideas, though, never cross the border where they were born. And when they do, they rarely arrive in a structured, applicable form to the people who could benefit from them.
manifesto.p2: The knowledge that defines excellence in global real estate — from the conversion scripts top brokers use in markets like New York, to the onboarding model the biggest London agencies apply to new consultants, to how Italian developers build local brands with international reach — rarely reaches, in a clear and structured way, the people who'd want to replicate it.
manifesto.p3: Globalle was built to change that.
manifesto.p4: We're not a market news aggregator. We're your point of contact between your local market and the best of strategic intelligence out there. We do the research, interview the right people, translate what's essential, and deliver it in language any ambitious professional can put to use immediately.
manifesto.p5: We believe the next generation of great names in real estate won't be shaped only by access to the best courses or mentors. It will be shaped by those with the curiosity to look outward — and the discipline to turn what they learn into action.
manifesto.p6: That's what Globalle delivers, week after week.
manifesto.closing: The borders are open. Join us on this journey.

cards.title: Smart Interview Curation
cards.body: We interview top professionals from markets around the globe — from the obvious ones to those you'd never expect. Every issue brings perspectives you won't find anywhere else.

cards.title: Cultural + Technical Insight
cards.body: We understand that practices from other markets can't just be copied — they need to be translated. With a cultural lens beyond the purely technical, we translate the nuances of each market for our readers.

cards.title: Deep Real Estate Experience
cards.body: We live and breathe real estate ourselves. With hands-on experience across different markets, our team is fluent in the business, turning tactics into actions you can really apply.

cards.title: A Community Built to Grow
cards.body: Our readers are professionals who apply what they read, share results, and build together. The community is part of the product. Join a group of professionals who want to win.

products.label: Products
products.headline: What Globalle offers
products.newsletter_body: The heart of Globalle. Every week, an in-depth look at a practice, case or trend from the global real estate market.
products.community_lead: For professionals who want to go beyond the newsletter.
products.community_body: The Globalle Community brings together brokers, managers, agency owners and real estate professionals who want to learn from the world, exchange experience and turn knowledge into action. More than a content community, Globalle is a network for real estate professionals who think bigger. Learn more on the Plans page.
products.consultoria_body: For brokers, teams and agencies who want to go beyond content and turn intelligence into concrete processes. From adopting new techniques to a full operational overhaul.

final_cta.headline: Join a community of professionals like you.
final_cta.subheadline: Subscribe now and join the professionals who already get global real estate intelligence every week.

consultoria.label: Advisory
consultoria.headline: Choose how you want to grow with Globalle
consultoria.subheadline: From community to strategic projects, we help real estate professionals and companies turn global references into practical action for sales, management, marketing and growth.
consultoria.positioning: The newsletter shows you what's happening in the world. The Community and Globalle's plans help you put it into practice.

plans.name: Starter Advisory
plans.description: For professionals and agencies who want to start applying new practices with direction.

plans.name: Growth Advisory
plans.description: For professionals, leaders and agencies who want closer, hands-on support.
features: Personalized action plan and team sales training
Review of materials and sales approach

plans.name: Custom Project
plans.description: For companies that need a specific, in-depth or more complex project.

comunidade.label: Community
comunidade.headline: Globalle Community
comunidade.subheadline: For real estate professionals who want to think beyond their own market
comunidade.intro1: The Globalle Community is a space for real estate professionals who want to go beyond the newsletter and join a qualified network for learning, discussion and exchanging opportunities.
comunidade.intro2: Every month, we bring together brokers, managers, agency owners and industry professionals to discuss international practices featured in our issues, market trends, sales strategies, technology, management and new ways to grow in real estate.
comunidade.intro3: The idea is simple: turn global references into practical, everyday action and build a network of professionals who share the same growth mindset.
comunidade.features_title: What you'll find in the community

features.title: Exclusive content
features.body: Materials, analyses, summaries and references that go deeper into the topics covered in the newsletter and help you turn knowledge into practice.

features.title: Monthly discussion sessions
features.body: Live meetings to discuss relevant topics in the global real estate market and understand how those ideas can be applied in your market.

features.title: International practices radar
features.body: A recurring curation of ideas, strategies and moves happening in other real estate markets that can inspire new actions in your own operation.

features.title: Qualified networking
features.body: A private group of professionals who want to exchange experience, discuss real challenges and build relationships with people who think globally.

features.title: Exchange of opportunities and referrals
features.body: A space to present needs, opportunities, partnerships, referrals and potential deals among community members.

features.title: Global access and qualified connections
features.body: Full interviews with international experts, networking with professionals from other markets, and strategic connections between members with complementary interests, goals and opportunities.

comunidade.audience_intro: The Globalle Community was created for professionals who want to learn from global practices, sharpen their craft and connect with other names in real estate.
comunidade.why_body: Our community is a space for exchange and learning, for professionals who want to discuss, apply and progress within a highly qualified network.
comunidade.plan_tagline: The newsletter delivers the idea. The community helps you discuss, adapt and apply it.
comunidade.newsletter_link: New here? Start with the newsletter

investidores.label: For investors
investidores.headline: Invest in property abroad, with clear goals and a transparent process.
investidores.subheadline: Globalle helps you through the whole process — from investment thesis to closing — bringing property options that match your profile. On our platform, you can follow every step.

what_items.title: A thesis built for you
what_items.body: We understand your goal, budget and target markets before showing a single property.

what_items.title: Active Curation
what_items.body: We source and filter relevant options, matched to your thesis.

what_items.title: A Guided Transaction
what_items.body: Properties, documents, costs and process steps visible from start to closing, in one place.

investidores.thesis_headline: Every investor has a different goal. The process starts by understanding yours.
investidores.thesis_subheadline: Our theses exist to serve every type of investment. The first conversation with our team is meant to understand yours and explain how we work.

objectives.title: Rental Income
objectives.body: Properties with rental income, weighing future demand, current yield and upside.

objectives.title: Wealth Preservation
objectives.body: Diversifying and protecting wealth in markets outside your home country.

objectives.title: Development
objectives.body: Projects and land with potential for development or redevelopment.

objectives.title: Home or Personal Use
objectives.body: A property for you to live in or use in another country.

objectives.title: Resale
objectives.body: Opportunities with appreciation potential, to buy and sell in the medium term.

investidores.form_headline: Tell us what you're looking for — leave the rest to Globalle.
investidores.form_subheadline: Fill out our form and our team will reach out with next steps.

lead_form.success_body: Our team will review it and reach out soon.

corretores.headline: Take your client across borders — without losing the deal.
corretores.subheadline: A program for agents and agencies who want to offer property abroad to their clients, with the support, network and process to do it safely.

features.title: Globalle Newsletter
features.body: Global real estate intelligence, every week — practices from the world's best markets, translated into action.

features.title: Advisory for selling abroad
features.body: Support to structure and run cross-border deals with your client, from first contact to closing.

features.title: Access to process and partners
features.body: Access to Globalle's partner network and the process already structured for each market.

features.title: International network
features.body: Connection with agents, agencies and professionals from other real estate markets.

features.title: Monthly meetings
features.body: Meetings to discuss real cases, trends and opportunities among agents in the network.

corretores.form_subheadline: Leave your contact — our team will explain the next steps.
